testcase.name: test_profile_user_a

testcase.name: test_profile_data_isolation

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None != None + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffb1287a5900>('email') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffb1287a5900> = {'avoidMovements': ['Stone to shoulder', 'Very low box squats', 'Aggressive from-floor max deadlift'], 'basePRs': {'bench': 100, 'deadlift': 300, 'ohp': 95, 'squat': 200}, 'bw12WeekGoal': 150.0, 'bwLongRunGoal': 230.0, ...}.get + where {'avoidMovements': ['Stone to shoulder', 'Very low box squats', 'Aggressive from-floor max deadlift'], 'basePRs': {'bench': 100, 'deadlift': 300, 'ohp': 95, 'squat': 200}, 'bw12WeekGoal': 150.0, 'bwLongRunGoal': 230.0, ...} = json() + where json = <Response [200]>.json + and None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffb1287a5f00>('email') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffb1287a5f00> = {'avoidMovements': ['Stone to shoulder', 'Very low box squats', 'Aggressive from-floor max deadlift'], 'basePRs': {'bench': 100, 'deadlift': 300, 'ohp': 95, 'squat': 200}, 'bw12WeekGoal': 150.0, 'bwLongRunGoal': 230.0, ...}.get + where {'avoidMovements': ['Stone to shoulder', 'Very low box squats', 'Aggressive from-floor max deadlift'], 'basePRs': {'bench': 100, 'deadlift': 300, 'ohp': 95, 'squat': 200}, 'bw12WeekGoal': 150.0, 'bwLongRunGoal': 230.0, ...} = json() + where json = <Response [200]>.json

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration8.py:102: in test_profile_data_isolation assert resp_a.json().get("email") != resp_b.json().get("email") E AssertionError: assert None != None E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffb1287a5900>('email') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffb1287a5900> = {'avoidMovements': ['Stone to shoulder', 'Very low box squats', 'Aggressive from-floor max deadlift'], 'basePRs': {'bench': 100, 'deadlift': 300, 'ohp': 95, 'squat': 200}, 'bw12WeekGoal': 150.0, 'bwLongRunGoal': 230.0, ...}.get E + where {'avoidMovements': ['Stone to shoulder', 'Very low box squats', 'Aggressive from-floor max deadlift'], 'basePRs': {'bench': 100, 'deadlift': 300, 'ohp': 95, 'squat': 200}, 'bw12WeekGoal': 150.0, 'bwLongRunGoal': 230.0, ...} = json() E + where json = <Response [200]>.json E + and None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffb1287a5f00>('email') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xffb1287a5f00> = {'avoidMovements': ['Stone to shoulder', 'Very low box squats', 'Aggressive from-floor max deadlift'], 'basePRs': {'bench': 100, 'deadlift': 300, 'ohp': 95, 'squat': 200}, 'bw12WeekGoal': 150.0, 'bwLongRunGoal': 230.0, ...}.get E + where {'avoidMovements': ['Stone to shoulder', 'Very low box squats', 'Aggressive from-floor max deadlift'], 'basePRs': {'bench': 100, 'deadlift': 300, 'ohp': 95, 'squat': 200}, 'bw12WeekGoal': 150.0, 'bwLongRunGoal': 230.0, ...} = json() E + where json = <Response [200]>.json
